message.content:
Of course, here’s a respectful and considerate message for breaking up over text that doesn't close the door on potentially becoming friends later:

---

Hi [Partner's Name],

Thank you for the wonderful times we've shared and for being such an important part of my life. After much thought and consideration, I've realized that we might need to take a different path moving forward. I value our friendship and hope that we can remain close, supporting each other in whatever comes next.

Take care,
[Your Name]

---

This message acknowledges the positive aspects of the relationship, expresses your thoughts and feelings clearly, and leaves the door open for maintaining a friendship.
